title: X-Ray / OPG
shortDesc: Straightforward imaging of internal structures, particularly bones. Bulk billed with Medicare referral.
description:
An X-ray (or radiograph) is a straightforward medical imaging technique that uses X-rays to capture images of internal structures, particularly bones. The process involves passing radiation through the body and recording the resulting shadows created by these structures.

At Goulburn Radiology, we are committed to delivering high-quality diagnostic imaging with a strong focus on patient safety and comfort. By utilizing state-of-the-art equipment and advanced imaging techniques, we are able to significantly reduce radiation exposure while maintaining exceptional image quality.
preparation: No preparation is usually required. Please wear comfortable clothing and remove jewellery from the area being examined.

title: Ultrasound
shortDesc: High-frequency sound wave imaging — completely safe, no radiation. Includes Obstetric, MSK, Vascular and General.
description:
An ultrasound examination uses high-frequency sound waves to create detailed images of the inside of your body. The sound waves are reflected back and processed into images that can be displayed on a screen.

Ultrasound has many benefits: it is completely safe, as it involves no radiation, and it is a painless, non-invasive procedure. At Goulburn Radiology we offer a full range of ultrasound services.
preparation: Preparation varies by examination type. Our staff will explain how to prepare at the time of your booking. Please call us on 02 4821 4666 if you have any questions.

title: CT Scanning
shortDesc: High-resolution cross-sectional imaging. Coming soon — currently awaiting power upgrade.
description: CT Scanning (Computed Tomography) combines X-ray images taken from many angles to create detailed cross-sectional images of the body. This service is coming soon to Goulburn Radiology — we are currently awaiting a power upgrade to support this equipment.
preparation: Please contact us for the latest availability.

title: Mammogram
shortDesc: Specialised breast imaging for screening and diagnosis. Coming soon — currently awaiting power upgrade.
description: Mammography is a specialised X-ray of the breast used for both routine screening and diagnostic assessment of breast symptoms. This service is coming soon to Goulburn Radiology — we are currently awaiting a power upgrade to support this equipment.
preparation: Please contact us for the latest availability.
